name: Brooklyn Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together ricotta and cream cheese, and add sugar.
2. Beat in eggs, one at a time.
3. Add lemon juice, vanilla, cornstarch, flour, and melted butter. Mix well.
4. Fold in sour cream and pour into a buttered 10-inch springform pan.
5. Place the cake in a cold oven.
6. Heat to 325°F (165°C) and bake for one hour.
7. Turn off the oven and leave the cake inside for two more hours.
8. Do not open the oven door while cooling.
9. Remove the cake and allow it to finish cooling.
10. Wrap and refrigerate. The cake is best the next day.
